Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I'm kind of hungry... Let's go out to eat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 13 5 110}Oh! I want a Frog Burger from Wilduck![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 0 25 25}I wanna try the new Frog Burger they have![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Sounds good, right? Come on, let's go![n]{f 1 1}
